gitCommit.subject: feat(product_images): close 3 canonical gaps — deep sim round 2 (200+ scenarios) (#931)
gitCommit.body:
feat(product_images): close 3 canonical gaps — deep sim round 2 (200+ scenarios) (#931)

* feat(product_images): CF×PI reconciliation 10/10 — melhorias M1–M12

Todas as 15 invariantes do health check passam (C01–C15: OK).

Migrations aplicadas em doufsxqlfjyuvxuezpln (2026-06-18):
- M01: Link 2.485 deps em 1.621 grupos por content_hash
- M02: RLS em 6 tabelas cf_recon (cf_image, ghost_check_queue, action_log, crawl_run, metric_snapshot, remediation)
- M03: Corrige 1.146 is_shared=true sem canonical_image_id
- M04: Re-sync primary_image_url de 1 produto divergente
- M05: Limpeza de 720 itens done na backfill_queue
- M06: Backfill last_modified_source=pipeline em 66.794 linhas
- M07: v_cf_drift_dashboard v2 (21 métricas: canonical, blurhash, content_hash)
- M08: fn_autolink_canonical_on_content_hash + trigger (dedup automático futuro)
- M09: reconcile_cf_image_status() — função SECURITY DEFINER para edge function
- M10: fn_product_images_health_check() — 15 invariantes C01–C15
- M11: Flatten 65 cadeias canônicas A→B→C → A→C
- M12: Corrige 65 artefactos de CTE (is_shared=true, canonical=NULL)

Estado final:
  recon_total=72079, pi_active_total=72079, pi_verified=72079 (100.00%)
  pi_orphaned=0, pi_missing=0, cf_orphans_not_in_pi=0
  pi_shared_no_canonical=0, canonical_chains_flat=OK

https://claude.ai/code/session_0114PNmsRZRNoH9MLGvfivET

* feat(product_images): close 3 canonical gaps found in deep simulation round 2

Simulation of 200+ scenarios across 12 attack categories revealed 3 real gaps:

- GAP-B6: Restoration of a soft-deleted dep whose canonical was subsequently
  deleted created a C13 violation (live image pointing to deleted root).
  Fix: trg_handle_image_restoration clears stale canonical on restoration.

- GAP-C3: Changing content_hash on an already-linked dep did not re-link to
  the new hash group (trigger skipped due to non-NULL canonical check).
  Fix: fn_autolink_canonical_on_content_hash now detects hash change on
  linked dep, clears old canonical, and re-links to the correct new root.

- GAP-D: Direct UPDATE of canonical_image_id to a dep (non-root) created
  chains violating C07. Health check detected but did not prevent.
  Fix: trg_prevent_canonical_chain auto-flattens any chain attempt silently.

Also adds idx_pi_canonical_active for optimal trigger query performance.
Health check: 15/15 OK post-deployment. All 3 gaps verified closed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0114PNmsRZRNoH9MLGvfivET

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
deve realizar login com sucesso e redirecionar para a home
